description: Empowers agents to audit and optimize host wireless adapter variables for high-fidelity physical micro-Doppler and vital sign sensing.

interface.description: Wireless network adapter name (e.g. wlo1, wlan0). If empty, auto-detects.

duration_seconds.description: Duration for dynamic baseline subtraction calibration.

execution_pipeline.name: Audit Interface
execution_pipeline.description: Scan system interfaces using `iw dev` to find the active wireless adapter and identify if Power Save mode is injecting latency spikes.

execution_pipeline.name: Optimize Adapter Settings
execution_pipeline.description: Turn off adapter power saving to lock the network card at max modulation rates, preventing MCS rate fallback downshifts.
execution_pipeline.action: sudo iw dev {{interface}} set power_save off

execution_pipeline.name: Establish Calibrated Room Baseline
execution_pipeline.description: Commence dynamic baseline extraction inside engine.py, mapping reflections to static ambient clutter values to isolate moving targets.
